contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Lineage self-serve program registration + landing/lineage UI polish
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/160
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/159
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/158
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/278
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/150
  
  Details:
  Built the request side of the two-step program-onboarding flow as a public self-serve form (truesight.me/lineage-register.html + js/lineage-register.js): auto-mints an anonymous RSA identity in the browser (capoeira-flow pattern, no wallet for the user) and fires two signed events to Edgar — [EMAIL REGISTERED EVENT] then [PROGRAM REGISTRATION REQUEST] — with a same-origin email-verification loop (handles ?vk=&em= on return). Wired lineage.html CTAs to it. Also: landing initiatives grid 2x2 + uniform portrait card crop (new lineage-card.jpg), fixed overflowing <code> URL on lineage.html, and removed the retired 'OpenClaw x Cursor / (not a manual post from Gary)' attribution from the daily digest. Updated PROGRAM_PARTNER_ONBOARDING.md build-order status.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
